description: A flat-design infographic slide in a deep-blue gradient background, part of a DHS series on its AI 'Roles and Responsibilities Framework.' The white all-caps headline at top reads 'PUBLIC SECTOR ENTITIES,' with an italic white subhead beneath: 'Comprises government entities at all levels responsible for overseeing and ensuring the safe adoption of AI.' A thin horizontal connector line with a circular node spans the slide and branches down to three white card panels, each containing a vector illustration and a light-blue label: (1) a domed Capitol-style building labeled 'Federal Government'; (2) a smaller columned civic building with lampposts, trees, and a red rooftop flag labeled 'Local Governments'; and (3) a green-and-blue stylized globe wrapped in orbital network lines labeled 'International Cooperation.' A lighter-blue band across the bottom contains white body text: 'The new DHS Roles and Responsibilities Framework encourages governments to establish AI safety standards, foster global collaboration, and invest in research that supports AI's safe integration in critical infrastructure.' The circular DHS seal appears at bottom-right. Visual style: clean corporate/government infographic with flat vector icons, sans-serif typography, and a cool blue palette. Messaging technique: explanatory policy communication, projecting competence and a structured framework for AI governance. Target audience: policy stakeholders, infrastructure operators, and the informed public. This is a designed infographic rather than a meme.
notable_text: PUBLIC SECTOR ENTITIES | Comprises government entities at all levels responsible for overseeing and ensuring the safe adoption of AI | Federal Government / Local Governments / International Cooperation | The new DHS Roles and Responsibilities Framework...
